# ADR 0001 — Authentication

Status: accepted

## Decision

The two apps authenticate differently because they serve different audiences:

- **Booking app**: short-lived **Bearer JWTs** (15-minute access tokens, refresh
  via cookie) on every `/api/*` endpoint. The token subject is the customer id.
- **Ops console**: **Okta SSO** sessions on every `/ops/*` endpoint, gated on the
  `ops-agent` role. No JWT path.

## Context

Customers are anonymous-until-signup and hit the API from browsers and a future
mobile app, so a stateless bearer token fits. Agents are employees already in
Okta, so reusing corporate SSO avoids a second identity store.
